all_results.label: Simplicity in Complexity

all_results.label: Quantization Distortion as a Universal Objective
all_results.quote: The quantization distortion is a common objective function among the different methods studied. We can treat the specific configuration of each method as the constraints when optimizing the common objective function.

all_results.label: Optimal Space Decomposition
